zh.lifeSummary: 當Jeanne d'Armagnac Duchesse de Berry於1346年6月24日出生在法國i萊-德-福朗斯瓦爾-達瓦朋托時，她的父親Jean d'Armagnac I35歲，母親Béatrice De Clermont Countess Of Charolais35歲。她於1360年10月17日與Jean de Valois I, le Magnifique, Duke of Berry在法國藍多-盧希隆奧德卡爾卡頌結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1387年3月15日在法國奧其坦尼塔沙吉素爾派-拉-波特享年40歲，埋葬在法國崔傑布格斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jeanne d'Armagnac Duchesse de Berry于1346年6月24日出生在法国i萊-德-福朗斯瓦爾-達瓦朋托时，她的父亲Jean d'Armagnac I35岁，母亲Béatrice De Clermont Countess Of Charolais35岁。她于1360年10月17日与Jean de Valois I, le Magnifique, Duke of Berry在法国藍多-盧希隆奧德卡爾卡頌结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1387年3月15日在法国奧其坦尼塔沙吉素爾派-拉-波特享年40岁，埋葬在法国崔傑布格斯。

variants.name: Jane
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Jeanne d'Armagnac Duchesse de Berry was born on 24 June 1346, in Pontoise, Val-d'Oise, Île-de-France, France, her father, Jean d'Armagnac I, was 35 and her mother, Béatrice De Clermont Countess Of Charolais, was 35. She married Jean de Valois I, le Magnifique, Duke of Berry on 17 October 1360, in Carcassonne, Aude, Languedoc-Roussillon, France. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 15 March 1387, in Saint-Sulpice-la-Pointe, Tarn, Occitanie, France, at the age of 40, and was buried in Bourges, Cher, Centre, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jeanne d'Armagnac Duchesse de Berry est née le 24 juin 1346, à Pontoise, Val-d'Oise, Île-de-France, France, son père, Jean d'Armagnac I, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Béatrice De Clermont Countess Of Charolais, avait 35 ans. Elle a épousé Jean de Valois I, le Magnifique, Duke of Berry le 17 octobre 1360, à Carcassonne, Aude, Languedoc-Roussillon, France. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 15 mars 1387, à Saint-Sulpice-la-Pointe, Tarn, Occitanie, France, à l’âge de 40 ans, et a été enterrée à Bourges, Cher, Centre, France.

de.Arrondissement de Lyon, Rhône, Rhône-Alp: Arrondissement de Lyon, Rhône, Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich
de.lifeSummary: Als Jeanne d'Armagnac Duchesse de Berry am 24. Juni 1346 in Pontoise, Val-d'Oise, Île-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Jean d'Armagnac I 35 und ihre Mutter Béatrice De Clermont Countess Of Charolais 35. Sie hat am 17. Oktober 1360 in Carcassonne, Aude, Languedoc-Roussillon, Frankreich Jean de Valois I, le Magnifique, Duke of Berry geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 15. März 1387 im Alter von 40 Jahren in Saint-Sulpice-la-Pointe, Tarn, Occitanie, Frankreich und wurde in Bourges, Cher, Centre, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jeanne d'Armagnac Duchesse de Berry è nata il il 24 giugno 1346 nel Pontoise, Val-d'Oise, Île-de-France, Francia, sua padre, Jean d'Armagnac I, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Béatrice De Clermont Countess Of Charolais, aveva 35 anni. Lei sposato Jean de Valois I, le Magnifique, Duke of Berry il 17 ottobre 1360, nel Carcassonne, Aude, Languedoc-Roussillon, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 15 marzo 1387, nel Saint-Sulpice-la-Pointe, Tarn, Occitanie, Francia, all'età di 40 anni, e fu sepolta a Bourges, Cher, Centre, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Jeanne d'Armagnac Duchesse de Berryが1346年6月24日にフランスiレ-デ-フランスヴァル-ド'オイゼポントイゼで生まれた時，父Jean d'Armagnac Iは35歳，母Béatrice De Clermont Countess Of Charolaisは35歳であった。1360年10月17日にフランスラングエドク-ロウシロンアウドカーカソンでJean de Valois I, le Magnifique, Duke of Berryと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1387年3月15日にフランスオクシタニーターンサイント-スルパセ-ラ-プオイントで40歳で死去し，フランスセントアチャーボウルジェズにて埋葬された。

ko.Arrondissement de Lyon, Rhône, Rhône-Alp: 프랑스 ho니-알프스 ho니 아론디젬트 데 리
ko.lifeSummary: Jeanne d'Armagnac Duchesse de Berry(이)가 1346년 6월 24일 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 발-드'이스 폰토이스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Jean d'Armagnac I(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Béatrice De Clermont Countess Of Charolais(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 1360년 10월 17일 프랑스 랭도c-루시런 오드 카르캐손에서 Jean de Valois I, le Magnifique, Duke of Berry(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1387년 3월 15일 프랑스 옥시탠이 터아른 세인트-설피스-라-포인트에서 40세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 세트르 처 부르그스에 묻혔다.

pt.Arrondissement de Lyon, Rhône, Rhône-Alp: Arrondissement de Lyon, Rhône, Rhône-Alpes, França
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jeanne d'Armagnac Duchesse de Berry nasceu em 24 de junho de 1346, em Pontoise, Val-d'Oise, Île-de-France, França, seu pai, Jean d'Armagnac I, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Béatrice De Clermont Countess Of Charolais, tinha 35 anos. Ela casou-se com Jean de Valois I, le Magnifique, Duke of Berry em 17 de outubro de 1360, em Carcassonne, Aude, Languedoc-Roussillon, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 15 de março de 1387, em Saint-Sulpice-la-Pointe, Tarn, Occitanie, França, com 40 anos, e foi sepultada em Bourges, Cher, Centre, França.

ru.Arrondissement de Lyon, Rhône, Rhône-Alp: аррондиссемент де лен, рoн, рoне-алпесь, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jeanne d'Armagnac Duchesse de Berry родилась 24 июня 1346 г. в местности понтоис, вал-д'оис, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция, её отцу по имени Jean d'Armagnac I было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Béatrice De Clermont Countess Of Charolais, 35. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Jean de Valois I, le Magnifique, Duke of Berry 17 октября 1360 г. в местности каркассонн, ауд, лангуедок-руссиллон, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 15 марта 1387 г. в местности сеинт-сульпаисе-ла-поинт, тарн, окситани, Франция в возрасте 40 лет и была похоронена в местности бургесь, чир, кентр, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jeanne d'Armagnac Duchesse de Berry nació el 24 de junio de 1346, en Pontoise, Val-d'Oise, Île-de-France, Francia, su papá, Jean d'Armagnac I, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Béatrice De Clermont Countess Of Charolais, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Jean de Valois I, le Magnifique, Duke of Berry el 17 de octubre de 1360, en Carcassonne, Aude, Languedoc-Roussillon, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 15 de marzo de 1387, en Saint-Sulpice-la-Pointe, Tarn, Occitanie, Francia, a la edad de 40 años, y fue sepultada en Bourges, Cher, Centre, Francia.
